name: Terminal
summary: A terminal-style code display component with syntax highlighting using react-syntax-highlighter.
detailedDescription: Terminal renders code snippets in a terminal-like interface with syntax highlighting. The component uses react-syntax-highlighter for language-aware code coloring, supporting multiple programming languages. Terminal styling includes monospace font, dark background (typically black or dark gray), and light text for high contrast. The component may include terminal window decorations (close/minimize/maximize buttons) for authentic appearance. Code displays with proper indentation, line numbers optional. Syntax highlighting uses color schemes matching popular terminal themes (e.g., Tomorrow Night, Atom One Dark). The component accepts code string and language props, rendering pre-formatted code blocks. Ideal for documentation, developer portfolios, or any context where displaying code snippets in authentic terminal aesthetic enhances technical credibility and readability.
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
